stimulus:
Welcome! In this study, you will play three short video games, completing a short survey after each game.

Please make sure you are in a quiet environment where you can focus for the duration of the study. Some games may use sound, so please ensure that your device's volume is not muted.

Press any key to begin.
Press any key to proceed to the first video game. Should you encounter a game-breaking bug, please report the issue in the Menu tab to the right of the screen.

response: {"creativity-rating":4,"creativity-free-response":"I love that we needed to use both hands to move the characters and also time the movements perfectly. I found the use of a tie signal very creative","originality-rating":5,"originality-free-response":"The narrative felt very creative, I love the simpleness of the characters and the background. Also, I didn´t expect to be needed to use both of my hands to play","effectiveness-rating":4,"effectiveness-free-response":"At first, I didn't get that I needed to keep the characters close to each other so I didn't lose signal, but when I got the hang of it it was fun and interesting","authenticity-rating":5,"attention-check":3,"intentionality-rating":4,"authenticity-intentionality-free-response":"I'm no expert but I haven't played a game where I needed to use both of my hands so it felt very original to me, also i loved the theme of like soulmates who can't keep that much apart "}

stimulus:

response: {"creativity-rating":2,"creativity-free-response":"I didn't quite get it, but I loved being a moth haha  ","originality-rating":2,"originality-free-response":"The main character felt very original to me, not every day you get to be a moth. ","effectiveness-rating":2,"effectiveness-free-response":"I had trouble understanding the goal of the game, so all I did was to flow and see how far I could go flapping the wings of the moth","authenticity-rating":4,"attention-check":3,"intentionality-rating":2,"authenticity-intentionality-free-response":"I give the developer points for character originality, but I didn't get the intention"}

response: {"creativity-rating":4,"creativity-free-response":"I think that the use of ink to protect a piece of land or an entire city was very creative, also that it didn't last forever and you needed to be aware of the time you had left","originality-rating":5,"originality-free-response":"The use of the fog and the ink felt very original to me, also some parts of the landscape being ink resistant were hilarious","effectiveness-rating":4,"effectiveness-free-response":"I'd say I pretty much enjoyed playing it but also, I felt stressed because if I didn't pay attention to the duration of the ink entire cities would be wiped out","authenticity-rating":5,"attention-check":3,"intentionality-rating":4,"authenticity-intentionality-free-response":"I did think the author transmitted their message with the making of this game, it felt very authentic and original"}
